0:
SELECT MAX(
    CASE 
        WHEN "Enrollment (K-12)" = 0 THEN 0 
        ELSE "Free Meal Count (K-12)" / "Enrollment (K-12)" 
    END
) AS highest_free_rate
FROM frpm
JOIN schools ON frpm.CDSCode = schools.CDSCode
WHERE schools.County = 'Alameda';	----- bird -----	california_schools
1:
SELECT f.CDSCode,
       f."Free Meal Count (Ages 5-17)" / f."Enrollment (Ages 5-17)" AS free_rate
FROM frpm f
WHERE f."School Type" = 'Continuation'
  AND f."Enrollment (Ages 5-17)" > 0
ORDER BY free_rate ASC
LIMIT 3;	----- bird -----	california_schools

SELECT MAX("Free Meal Count (Ages 5-17)" * 1.0 / "Enrollment (Ages 5-17)") AS highest_eligible_free_rate
FROM frpm

WHERE satscores.NumTstTakr > 0
  AND satscores.NumGE1500 * 1.0 / satscores.NumTstTakr > 0.3
  AND "Enrollment (Ages 5-17)" > 0;	----- bird -----	california_schools

48:
SELECT 
    CAST(
        (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT s.CDSCode)
         FROM schools s
         JOIN frpm f ON s.CDSCode = f.CDSCode
         JOIN satscores ss ON s.CDSCode = ss.cds
         WHERE s.DOC = '54' AND s.County = 'Orange')
    AS REAL) /
    NULLIF(
        (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT s.CDSCode)
         FROM schools s
         JOIN frpm f ON s.CDSCode = f.CDSCode
         JOIN satscores ss ON s.CDSCode = ss.cds
         WHERE s.DOC = '52' AND s.County = 'Orange'), 0) 
    AS ratio;	----- bird -----	california_schools

    COUNT(*) AS schools_k8,
    COUNT(DISTINCT s.City) OVER () AS total_cities

JOIN schools s ON f.CDSCode = s.CDSCode

SELECT name,
       district,
       cnt
FROM (
    SELECT name,
           district,
           COUNT(*) AS cnt,
           SUM(COUNT(*)) OVER (PARTITION BY name) AS total_cnt,
           ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY name ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC) AS rn_name,
           DENSE_RANK() OVER (ORDER BY SUM(COUNT(*)) OVER (PARTITION BY name) DESC) AS name_rank
    FROM (
        SELECT AdmFName1 AS name, District FROM schools WHERE AdmFName1 IS NOT NULL
        UNION ALL
        SELECT AdmFName2, District FROM schools WHERE AdmFName2 IS NOT NULL
        UNION ALL
        SELECT AdmFName3, District FROM schools WHERE AdmFName3 IS NOT NULL
    )
    GROUP BY name, district
)
WHERE name_rank <= 2
  AND rn_name = 1
ORDER BY name_rank, cnt DESC;	----- bird -----	california_schools

SELECT
    CASE
        WHEN sum1996 = 0 THEN NULL
        ELSE (sum1997 - sum1996) * 100.0 / sum1996
    END AS growth_rate
FROM (
    SELECT
        SUM(CASE WHEN strftime('%Y', l.date) = '1996' THEN l.amount END) AS sum1996,
        SUM(CASE WHEN strftime('%Y', l.date) = '1997' THEN l.amount END) AS sum1997
    FROM loan l
    JOIN account a ON l.account_id = a.account_id
    JOIN disp d ON a.account_id = d.account_id
    JOIN client c ON d.client_id = c.client_id
    WHERE c.gender = 'M'
) AS totals;	----- bird -----	financial

            CASE WHEN a1.element <= a2.element THEN a1.element ELSE a2.element END AS elem1,
            CASE WHEN a1.element > a2.element THEN a1.element ELSE a2.element END AS elem2,
            COUNT(*) AS cnt
        FROM connected c
        JOIN atom a1 ON c.atom_id = a1.atom_id
        JOIN atom a2 ON c.atom_id2 = a2.atom_id
        GROUP BY elem1, elem2
    )
) AS max_combo,
(
    SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_cnt
    FROM bond
) AS total;	----- bird -----	toxicology

637:
SELECT DISTINCT substr(rest, 2, instr(rest, '>')-2) AS Tag
FROM (
    WITH RECURSIVE tag_split(id, rest) AS (
        SELECT p.Id,
               p.Tags
        FROM posts p
        JOIN users u ON p.OwnerUserId = u.Id
        WHERE u.DisplayName = 'Mark Meckes' AND p.CommentCount = 0
        UNION ALL
        SELECT id,
               substr(rest, instr(rest, '>')+1)
        FROM tag_split
        WHERE rest <> '' AND instr(rest, '>') > 0
    )
    SELECT id, rest
    FROM tag_split
    WHERE rest <> '' AND instr(rest, '>') > 0
) AS extracted;	----- bird -----	codebase_community

SELECT d.forename || ' ' || d.surname AS driver,
       d.nationality,
       p.max_points
FROM (
    SELECT driverId, MAX(wins) AS total_wins

    GROUP BY driverId
) w
JOIN (
    SELECT MAX(total_wins) AS max_total
    FROM (
        SELECT driverId, MAX(wins) AS total_wins
        FROM driverStandings
        GROUP BY driverId
    )
) m ON w.total_wins = m.max_total
JOIN (
    SELECT driverId, MAX(points) AS max_points

) AS avg_fastest_lap_seconds

944:
SELECT
    (( (CAST(substr(last.time,1,2) AS INTEGER)*3600 +
         CAST(substr(last.time,4,2) AS INTEGER)*60 +
         CAST(substr(last.time,7,2) AS INTEGER) +
         CAST(substr(last.time,10,3) AS INTEGER)/1000.0)
       -
       (CAST(substr(champ.time,1,2) AS INTEGER)*3600 +
         CAST(substr(champ.time,4,2) AS INTEGER)*60 +
         CAST(substr(champ.time,7,2) AS INTEGER) +
         CAST(substr(champ.time,10,3) AS INTEGER)/1000.0)
      )
     /
     (CAST(substr(last.time,1,2) AS INTEGER)*3600 +
         CAST(substr(last.time,4,2) AS INTEGER)*60 +
         CAST(substr(last.time,7,2) AS INTEGER) +
         CAST(substr(last.time,10,3) AS INTEGER)/1000.0)
) * 100.0 AS percent_faster
FROM
    (SELECT time
     FROM results
     WHERE raceId = (SELECT raceId FROM races WHERE year = 2008 AND name = 'Australian Grand Prix')
       AND position = 1
       AND time IS NOT NULL
     LIMIT 1) champ,
    (SELECT time
     FROM results
     WHERE raceId = (SELECT raceId FROM races WHERE year = 2008 AND name = 'Australian Grand Prix')
       AND time IS NOT NULL
     ORDER BY position DESC
     LIMIT 1) last;	----- bird -----	formula_1

  AND ra.year BETWEEN 2007 AND 2009;	----- bird -----	formula_1

SELECT
    r.year,
    AVG(
        CAST(substr(res.time, 1, 2) AS INTEGER) * 3600 +
        CAST(substr(res.time, 4, 2) AS INTEGER) * 60 +
        CAST(substr(res.time, 7, 2) AS INTEGER) +
        CAST(substr(res.time, 10) AS INTEGER) / 1000.0
    ) AS avg_seconds
FROM results res
JOIN races r ON res.raceId = r.raceId
WHERE r.year < 1975
  AND res.time IS NOT NULL
  AND (r.year, res.driverId) IN (
      SELECT year, driverId
      FROM (
          SELECT
              r.year,
              res.driverId,
              SUM(res.points) AS total_points,
              RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY r.year ORDER BY SUM(res.points) DESC) AS rn
          FROM results res
          JOIN races r ON res.raceId = r.raceId
          WHERE r.year < 1975
          GROUP BY r.year, res.driverId
      )
      WHERE rn = 1
  )
GROUP BY r.year;	----- bird -----	formula_1

JOIN Team_Attributes ta ON t.team_api_id = ta.team_api_id

  AND ta.date <= '2014-01-31 00:00:00'

SELECT p.player_name
FROM (
    SELECT pa.player_api_id, AVG(pa.finishing) AS avg_finishing
    FROM Player_Attributes pa
    WHERE pa.player_api_id IN (
        SELECT player_api_id FROM Player WHERE height = (SELECT MAX(height) FROM Player)
        UNION
        SELECT player_api_id FROM Player WHERE height = (SELECT MIN(height) FROM Player)
    )
    GROUP BY pa.player_api_id
    ORDER BY avg_finishing DESC
    LIMIT 1
) AS best
JOIN Player p ON p.player_api_id = best.player_api_id;	----- bird -----	european_football_2

1121:
SELECT SUM(m.home_team_goal) AS total_home_goals
FROM "Match" m
WHERE EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM (
        SELECT m.home_player_1 AS pid UNION ALL
        SELECT m.home_player_2 UNION ALL
        SELECT m.home_player_3 UNION ALL
        SELECT m.home_player_4 UNION ALL
        SELECT m.home_player_5 UNION ALL
        SELECT m.home_player_6 UNION ALL
        SELECT m.home_player_7 UNION ALL
        SELECT m.home_player_8 UNION ALL
        SELECT m.home_player_9 UNION ALL
        SELECT m.home_player_10 UNION ALL
        SELECT m.home_player_11
    ) hp
    JOIN Player p ON p.player_api_id = hp.pid
    WHERE (julianday('now') - julianday(p.birthday)) / 365.25 <= 30
);	----- bird -----	european_football_2

SELECT DISTINCT p.player_name, c.name AS country
FROM Player_Attributes pa
JOIN Player p ON pa.player_api_id = p.player_api_id

    m.home_player_1 = p.player_api_id OR m.home_player_2 = p.player_api_id OR m.home_player_3 = p.player_api_id OR
    m.home_player_4 = p.player_api_id OR m.home_player_5 = p.player_api_id OR m.home_player_6 = p.player_api_id OR
    m.home_player_7 = p.player_api_id OR m.home_player_8 = p.player_api_id OR m.home_player_9 = p.player_api_id OR
    m.home_player_10 = p.player_api_id OR m.home_player_11 = p.player_api_id OR
    m.away_player_1 = p.player_api_id OR m.away_player_2 = p.player_api_id OR m.away_player_3 = p.player_api_id OR
    m.away_player_4 = p.player_api_id OR m.away_player_5 = p.player_api_id OR m.away_player_6 = p.player_api_id OR
    m.away_player_7 = p.player_api_id OR m.away_player_8 = p.player_api_id OR m.away_player_9 = p.player_api_id OR
    m.away_player_10 = p.player_api_id OR m.away_player_11 = p.player_api_id
)

1128:
SELECT c.name AS country, AVG(p.weight) AS avg_weight
FROM (
    SELECT country_id, home_player_1   AS player_api_id FROM "Match"
    UNION ALL SELECT country_id, home_player_2   FROM "Match"
    UNION ALL SELECT country_id, home_player_3   FROM "Match"
    UNION ALL SELECT country_id, home_player_4   FROM "Match"
    UNION ALL SELECT country_id, home_player_5   FROM "Match"
    UNION ALL SELECT country_id, home_player_6   FROM "Match"
    UNION ALL SELECT country_id, home_player_7   FROM "Match"
    UNION ALL SELECT country_id, home_player_8   FROM "Match"
    UNION ALL SELECT country_id, home_player_9   FROM "Match"
    UNION ALL SELECT country_id, home_player_10  FROM "Match"
    UNION ALL SELECT country_id, home_player_11  FROM "Match"
    UNION ALL SELECT country_id, away_player_1   FROM "Match"
    UNION ALL SELECT country_id, away_player_2   FROM "Match"
    UNION ALL SELECT country_id, away_player_3   FROM "Match"
    UNION ALL SELECT country_id, away_player_4   FROM "Match"
    UNION ALL SELECT country_id, away_player_5   FROM "Match"
    UNION ALL SELECT country_id, away_player_6   FROM "Match"
    UNION ALL SELECT country_id, away_player_7   FROM "Match"
    UNION ALL SELECT country_id, away_player_8   FROM "Match"
    UNION ALL SELECT country_id, away_player_9   FROM "Match"
    UNION ALL SELECT country_id, away_player_10  FROM "Match"
    UNION ALL SELECT country_id, away_player_11  FROM "Match"
) AS mp
JOIN Player p   ON p.player_api_id = mp.player_api_id
JOIN Country c  ON c.id = mp.country_id
GROUP BY c.name
ORDER BY avg_weight DESC
LIMIT 1;	----- bird -----	european_football_2

1481:
SELECT
    (SELECT avg_consumption FROM avg_per_seg WHERE Segment = 'SME') -
    (SELECT avg_consumption FROM avg_per_seg WHERE Segment = 'LAM') AS diff_SME_LAM,
    (SELECT avg_consumption FROM avg_per_seg WHERE Segment = 'LAM') -
    (SELECT avg_consumption FROM avg_per_seg WHERE Segment = 'KAM') AS diff_LAM_KAM,
    (SELECT avg_consumption FROM avg_per_seg WHERE Segment = 'KAM') -
    (SELECT avg_consumption FROM avg_per_seg WHERE Segment = 'SME') AS diff_KAM_SME
FROM (
    WITH cust_czk AS (
        SELECT CustomerID, Segment
        FROM customers
        WHERE Currency = 'CZK'
    ),
    cons_2013 AS (
        SELECT y.CustomerID,
               SUM(y.Consumption) AS total_consumption
        FROM yearmonth y
        JOIN cust_czk cc ON y.CustomerID = cc.CustomerID
        WHERE substr(y.Date, 1, 4) = '2013'
        GROUP BY y.CustomerID
    ),
    min_totals AS (
        SELECT cc.Segment,
               MIN(c.total_consumption) AS min_total
        FROM cons_2013 c
        JOIN cust_czk cc ON c.CustomerID = cc.CustomerID
        GROUP BY cc.Segment
    ),
    cnt_min AS (
        SELECT cc.Segment,
               COUNT(*) AS cnt_min
        FROM cons_2013 c
        JOIN cust_czk cc ON c.CustomerID = cc.CustomerID
        JOIN min_totals m ON cc.Segment = m.Segment
                         AND c.total_consumption = m.min_total
        GROUP BY cc.Segment
    ),
    avg_per_seg AS (
        SELECT m.Segment,
               m.min_total * 1.0 / c.cnt_min AS avg_consumption
        FROM min_totals m
        JOIN cnt_min c ON m.Segment = c.Segment
    )
    SELECT * FROM avg_per_seg
) AS avg_per_seg;	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing
1482:
SELECT Segment, pct_increase
FROM (
    WITH seg_year AS (
        SELECT c.Segment,
               substr(y.Date,1,4) AS Year,
               SUM(y.Consumption) AS total_consumption
        FROM yearmonth y
        JOIN customers c ON y.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
        WHERE c.Currency = 'EUR'
          AND substr(y.Date,1,4) IN ('2012','2013')
        GROUP BY c.Segment, Year
    ),
    pivot AS (
        SELECT
            Segment,
            MAX(CASE WHEN Year='2012' THEN total_consumption END) AS cons_2012,
            MAX(CASE WHEN Year='2013' THEN total_consumption END) AS cons_2013
        FROM seg_year
        GROUP BY Segment
    ),
    pct AS (
        SELECT
            Segment,
            (cons_2013 - cons_2012) * 100.0 / cons_2013 AS pct_increase
        FROM pivot
        WHERE cons_2013 IS NOT NULL AND cons_2012 IS NOT NULL
    )
    SELECT Segment, pct_increase
    FROM pct
    WHERE pct_increase = (SELECT MAX(pct_increase) FROM pct)
       OR pct_increase = (SELECT MIN(pct_increase) FROM pct)
) 
ORDER BY pct_increase DESC;	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing

1491:
SELECT
    sp.Country,
    COUNT(*) AS value_for_money_stations
FROM (
    SELECT
        gs.GasStationID,
        gs.Country,
        SUM(t.Price * t.Amount) / NULLIF(SUM(t.Amount), 0) AS unit_price
    FROM gasstations AS gs
    JOIN transactions_1k AS t
        ON t.GasStationID = gs.GasStationID
    GROUP BY gs.GasStationID
) AS sp,
(
    SELECT
        SUM(t.Price * t.Amount) / NULLIF(SUM(t.Amount), 0) AS overall_price
    FROM transactions_1k AS t
) AS o
WHERE sp.unit_price < o.overall_price
GROUP BY sp.Country;	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing

SELECT (y12.c2012 - y13.c2013) / y12.c2012 AS consumption_decrease_rate
FROM (SELECT CustomerID
      FROM transactions_1k
      WHERE Date = '2012-08-25' AND Price = 634.8) AS t
JOIN (SELECT CustomerID, SUM(Consumption) AS c2012
      FROM yearmonth
      WHERE substr(Date, 1, 4) = '2012'
      GROUP BY CustomerID) AS y12
  ON t.CustomerID = y12.CustomerID
JOIN (SELECT CustomerID, SUM(Consumption) AS c2013
      FROM yearmonth
      WHERE substr(Date, 1, 4) = '2013'
      GROUP BY CustomerID) AS y13
  ON t.CustomerID = y13.CustomerID;	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing
